mapper.sql: m.id, m.model_code, m.model_name, m.provider_code, p.provider_name, m.api_model, m.capability_tags, m.max_context_tokens, m.max_output_tokens, m.temperature_enabled, m.enabled, m.priority, m.remark, m.create_time, m.update_time, m.created_by, m.updated_by AS last_modified_by, m.version, c.id AS credential_id, c.credential_code, c.api_key_masked, c.key_version, c.enabled AS credential_enabled, c.expire_at, c.remark AS credential_remark

FROM ai_model_config m LEFT JOIN ai_provider_config p ON p.provider_code = m.provider_code AND p.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN ai_model_credential c ON c.id = ( SELECT ic.id FROM ai_model_credential ic WHERE ic.model_code = m.model_code AND ic.deleted = 0 ORDER BY ic.id DESC LIMIT 1 ) WHERE m.deleted = 0

if.if: AND ( m.model_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.keyword}, '%') OR m.model_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.keyword}, '%') OR m.api_model LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.keyword}, '%') OR m.capability_tags LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.keyword}, '%') OR m.remark LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.keyword}, '%') OR m.provider_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.keyword}, '%') OR p.provider_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.keyword}, '%') OR c.credential_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.keyword}, '%') )

mapper.select:
SELECT
ORDER BY m.priority ASC, m.update_time DESC, m.id DESC
